message:
refactor: deduplicate star formatting, memoize TldrToolCard, smooth header animations, and fix SSR hydration

- Replace local formatStars helper in flywheel-visualization.tsx with
  the shared formatStarCount utility from @/lib/format-stars
- Move stale-data detection in notable-stargazers.tsx into a useEffect
  to avoid SSR/client hydration mismatch, and add timeZone: "UTC" for
  consistent date rendering across environments
- Pipe scroll-driven blur and padding motion values in site-header.tsx
  through useSpring for smoother interpolation, and improve Mac platform
  detection by also checking navigator.userAgent for "Macintosh" /
  "Mac OS X" (not just navigator.platform which is deprecated)
- Wrap TldrToolCard export in React.memo to prevent unnecessary
  re-renders when parent state changes
- Remove duplicate default export line in use-click-particles.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
